title: Persona 3 Green Moon
description: Recolors the moon to look like the green moon from Persona 3
body:
**Full moon again...**

**Crazy how times flies...**

**🌑 Recolors the moon to the green moon from Persona 3 🌑**

except it's every single moon phase you can thank me later

take on your shenanigans under the green moonlight

(yes this is the 4th persona thing i post)
